use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF ADULTS WITH SYMPTOMATIC NEW YORK HEART ASSOCIATION (NYHA) CLASS II-III OBSTRUCTIVE HYPERTROPHIC CARDIOMYOPATHY (HCM) TO IMPROVE FUNCTIONAL CAPACITY AND SYMPTOMS

indications.text:
CAMZYOSTM is indicated for the treatment of adults with symptomatic New York Heart
Association (NYHA) class II-III obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy (HCM) to improve
functional capacity and symptoms.

CAMZYOS® is indicated for the treatment of adults with symptomatic New York Heart
Association (NYHA) class II-III obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy (HCM) to improve
functional capacity and symptoms.

Association (NYHA) class II-III obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy (HCM) to improve
functional capacity and symptoms.
